## What does this PR do?

<!-- A new skill? An improvement to an existing one? A docs fix? -->

## If you're adding or changing a skill

- [ ] The folder name matches the `name:` field in the frontmatter.
- [ ] `description` says **what it does and when to use it**, with trigger keywords.
- [ ] All template sections are filled with real content — no `TODO`s, no stubs.
- [ ] There's a concrete **Output format** block.
- [ ] No fabricated numbers; the method separates observed facts from inferences.
- [ ] It analyzes a **business / site / asset**, not a private individual.
- [ ] I added a row to the catalog table in `README.md`.
